name: Key Lime Bars
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Filling:
4 Eggs; beaten
4 tbsp Flour
2 cups Sugar
1 tsp Salt
6 tbsp Key lime juice
1 tsp Baking powder
Confectioners' sugar
Crust:
For the crust, mix the butter, confectioners' sugar, and flour. Pat the mixture into a 9x12-inch pan. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes, watching carefully.
Filling Preparation:
Beat together the eggs, sugar, lime juice, flour, salt, and baking powder. Pour the filling over the crust. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 25 minutes. Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar and cut into bars.
